human_review_items.summary: Residual slug mismatch: metadata.yaml > broken_solutions key 'wrong_crs_metadata_only' vs. on-disk directory reference/failures/broken_wrong_crs/ (README now aligned to the directory name at this audit). Cosmetic, nothing programmatic consumes the key; fix touches reference/failures/ on one side so the evaluator cannot apply it. Suggest renaming the metadata key to 'wrong_crs'; no task.json.version bump needed. Carried forward (6th consecutive review).
